questions.question: What is the MSK-IMPACT panel, and what are its main panel versions referenced in the corpus?
Describe each of the four features in the Aerts CT radiomic signature and what aspect of tumor phenotype they capture.
What is the PRISSMM NLP curation framework and how is it used in the MSK-CHORD study?
What is the LymphGen classification system, and how was it validated in the corpus?
What is the ROBIN consortium, what projects does it run, and which diseases does it cover?
How is homologous-recombination deficiency (HRD) characterized in the HGSOC multimodal risk-stratification paper?
In the MSK-CHORD study, what percentage of lung adenocarcinoma patients harbored SETD2 driver mutations?
In the radiation-associated sarcoma cohort, which driver alteration dominates RT-angiosarcoma of the breast/chest wall, and at what frequency?
In the ADC radiosensitization study, what tumor doubling-time increase was observed in HER2-positive OE19 xenografts receiving T-DM1 combined with 2.5 Gy x 3 radiation?
In the ROBIN consortium preclinical data, which dietary intervention unexpectedly promoted radio-resistance?
What four CT radiomic features make up the Aerts prognostic signature trained on NSCLC Lung1/MAASTRO?
In the phase 2 IMRT + nivolumab trial for recurrent HNSCC, what was the 1-year progression-free survival rate?
What targeted therapy is the subject of the FGFR3-altered urothelial carcinoma real-world outcomes study?
In the peripheral T-cell lymphoma CHOP-based chemotherapy cohort, which mutation identified high-risk events?
In the appendiceal adenocarcinoma molecular classification, which two RAS-pathway genes co-drive the mucinous subtype?
Which corpus papers profile patients using an MSK-IMPACT targeted panel (any version, including IMPACT341/410/468/505 or the generic msk-impact-panel)?
Which corpus papers focus on head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSC)?
List all corpus papers that analyze circulating tumor DNA (ctDNA) as a primary modality.
Which corpus papers describe publicly released TCIA imaging datasets?
Which corpus papers analyze KRAS mutations as a driver or biomarker focus (not just incidental mention)?
Which corpus papers evaluate PD-1 or PD-L1 immune checkpoint blockade in patients?
Where in the corpus do papers disagree about whether a CT radiomic signature generalizes across institutions for head-and-neck cancer prognosis? Summarize both sides.
How do the corpus papers characterize the long-term molecular sequelae of radiotherapy on previously-irradiated tissue?
Across the corpus trials of PD-1 or PD-L1 blockade, what biomarkers of response appear, and do they agree across disease sites?
What evidence across the corpus links DNA-damage-response biology to aggressive or treatment-refractory phenotypes in multiple tumor types?
Across the ctDNA papers in the corpus, what common utilities emerge, and where do the approaches differ in clinical question?
Across the lymphoma papers in the corpus (CLL, Hodgkin, DLBCL, PTCL, PCNSL), what common themes emerge about how genomic subclassification informs clinical stratification?
What does the corpus say about the role of tumor volume as a baseline against which imaging-derived models must prove incremental prognostic value?
How do the two rhabdomyosarcoma papers in the corpus differ in their genomic findings and clinical framing?
Across the corpus, what evidence links environmental radiation or UV exposure to acquired somatic alterations or epigenetic drift?
